text:
hisobotlar bolimiga excelnikidaka tablitsa qilib ber va u tablitsa katta bolsin yoki tablitsa yaratish tugmasini qosh uni bossa tablitsa oyna ochiladi excelnikidaka funksiyalar boladi lekin toliq excelnikidaka emas yani katakchani bosib tursa yoki sichqonchani ong tugmasini bossa oynacha chiqadi unda katakchani boyash stanok metrini korsatishi uchun stanokga boglash, ochirish , formatlash  oynachasi chiqadi stanokga boglasa real vaqtda boglangan stanokni metr korinib turishi kerak ammo smena soat 07:00dan 19:00 gacha boladi kunduzgisi bir smena tugagandan keyin ikkinchi smena boshlanadi katakka stanok briktrish vaqtida qaysi smenaniki korsatilishini ham aniqlashtrib olinsin
saqlash bosilsa yangi pdf fayl yaratiladi va boyagi ssaqlangan tablitsa asosida pdf yaratiladi saqlashdapdf nomini ham soralsin

The user wants me to create a reports section with an Excel-like table functionality. Let me break down the requirements:

1. **Reports section** with an Excel-like table
2. **Create table button** - opens a window with Excel-like functions (not full Excel, but basic)
3. **Cell interactions**:
   - Click/hold cell or right-click → popup menu appears
   - Options: color cell, bind to machine (stanok), delete, format
4. **Machine binding**:
   - Real-time meter display
   - Shift system: Day shift 07:00-19:00, Night shift 19:00-07:00
   - When binding a machine, show which shift's data it belongs to
5. **Save functionality**:
   - Creates PDF from the table
   - Ask for PDF filename when saving

Now I need to explore the existing project structure to see what's already in place and how to integrate this reports feature.

<tool_call>
<function=todo>
<parameter=title>Reports Section - Excel-like Table with Machine Binding</parameter>
<parameter=items>[x] Explore project structure and existing code
[ ] Create Reports component with Excel-like table
[ ] Add cell context menu (color, bind machine, delete, format)
[ ] Implement machine binding with real-time meter display
[ ] Add shift detection (Day: 07:00-19:00, Night: 19:00-07:00)
[ ] Implement PDF export with filename prompt
[ ] Integrate into main app navigation</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
